apple_script:
tell application "Messages"
  set targetService to 1st service whose service type = iMessage
  set targetBuddy to buddy "+61473669759" of targetService
  send "[OC2A iMessage Bridge Self-Test #1] If you see this on Ken's iPhone, the bridge is working. No reply needed. — Yoda/Forge, 2026-07-14 19:46 AEST" to targetBuddy
end tell
